item.title: adidas Men s Essentials Fleece Hoodie SWEATSHIRT Black / White XL
item.description: Vous avez adidas Men s Essentials Fleece Hoodie SWEATSHIRT Black / White XL ici: ℹ️: Poche kangourou. 70 % coton, 30 % polyester (recyclé). Capuche réglable par cordon de serrage. base et bords côtelés. Chaussant standard. 🛒 Achetez-le maintenant!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
